locations.name: Ashford
locations.description: Cassian's home city. Ground zero of early Rapture events.

locations.name: Ashford Harbor
locations.description: First major sky fracture visible on live broadcast.

locations.name: Cassian's Apartment
locations.description: Fourth-floor studio above a closed nail salon. Cassian's barricade and first solo nights.

locations.name: Logistics Office
locations.description: Fourth-floor shipping-manifest office where Cassian worked pre-Rapture.

locations.name: Hale Family Home
locations.description: Rowan and Elena's house on Ashford's outskirts — lawn, dinner table, firefighter stories.

locations.name: Ashford Outskirts
locations.description: Suburban ring around Ashford. Hale family orbit; shelters and exodus routes.

locations.name: Adrian and Selene's Apartment
locations.description: Apartment above the bakery where Adrian and Selene weather the first dragon.

locations.name: University District
locations.description: Marcus Vale's evacuation route when the convoy fails and roads collapse.

locations.name: Central Wilds
locations.description: Migration corridor north and west of Ashford. Nora's field territory; wildlife wrong before monsters arrive.

locations.name: Outskirts Shelter
locations.description: Hale Hold — Rowan's family cluster, guard rotations, Elena's healing corner.

locations.name: Ruin Belt
locations.description: Collapsed margins and block-by-block monster density east and south of Ashford.

locations.name: Ashford Margins
locations.description: Outer ruin ring where Adrian searches for Selene and Rowan's route.

locations.name: Field Shelter
locations.description: Temporary hold with a field-lab corner — Marcus's first mana readings.

locations.name: Refugee Camp Gymnasium
locations.description: School gymnasium intake camp. Selene's ledger, reunions, and waiting for Adrian.

locations.name: Ashford Highway Interchange
locations.description: Collapsed junction of three major routes. Canon milestone: cast paths cross within hours, never meet.

locations.name: Abandoned Highway
locations.description: Post-Rapture roads with wrong geometry. Future Highway Camp site glimpsed but not named.

locations.name: Ruin Belt East
locations.description: Eastward ruin corridor where Adrian accumulates stragglers while searching.

locations.name: Ashford Margins West
locations.description: Western margin routes — Marcus and family bearing away from the city.

locations.name: Refugee Trail East
locations.description: Eastern rumor road Selene follows away from the gymnasium camp.

locations.name: Ashford Elevated District
locations.description: High ground where Cassian scouts defensible positions and Sanctuary foreshadow.

locations.name: Mobile Shelter
locations.description: Vale family on the move — trailer, data, and honest answers for Lily.

locations.name: Eastern Wilds
locations.description: Territory east of the interchange. Mutable roads and eastern horizon glow.

locations.name: Eastern Refugee Trail
locations.description: Foot-traffic corridor east of Ashford. Selene's path; all networks dead.

locations.name: Open Road
locations.description: Exodus route where Cassian finally leaves Ashford behind.

locations.name: Wild Zone Edge
locations.description: Boundary where wild-zone rules dominate and human maps stop being reliable.

locations.name: Impossible Ruins
locations.description: Pre-human stonework with wrong angles. Wrong stars visible through gaps at midday.

locations.name: The First Dungeon
locations.description: Colossal structure rising on the eastern horizon — visible for miles, not entered in Volume 1.

locations.name: Highway Camp
locations.description: First major survivor community along abandoned highway.

locations.name: Sanctuary Valley
locations.description: Defensible fertile valley; future Sanctuary site.

locations.name: Sanctuary
locations.description: Humanity's beacon; white stone; Founder's Tree.

locations.name: Ashwolf Forest
locations.description: First named monster territory.

locations.name: Ironhorn Plains
locations.description: Territorial plains beasts.

locations.name: The Archive Spires
locations.description: Aetherian capital; largest library.

locations.name: Celestial Peaks
locations.description: Seat of Dragon Conclave.

locations.name: Black Stone
locations.description: Viktor's fortified capital.

locations.name: Limbo
locations.description: Fragmented reality; time distortion.
